independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `tests/test_tools_general.py` exercises every Group-A / Group-B / Group-C / Group-D / Group-E scenario in the `.feature` file that targets a general tool.
criteria_verification.evidence: Extended tests/test_tools_general.py with 14 new TestScenario* classes mapping 1:1 to every general-tool Gherkin scenario in features/feat-jarvis-002-core-tools-and-dispatch.feature: Group A (read_file/search_web/calculate/get_calendar_events happy paths — 4 scenarios), Group B (read_file 1MiB outline 4 examples + search_web max_results outline 5 examples + calculate division-by-zero + calculate overflow), Group C (read_file path_traversal/not_found/not_a_file/encoding + search_web missing-key/empty-query + get_calendar_events invalid_window + calculate unsafe-tokens outline 3 examples), Group D (the 'every tool converts errors into structured strings' outline asserted for all 4 general tools), Group E (read_file null-byte + symlink + .. traversal + search_web DEGRADED + hostile-snippet passthrough). Outline tables are reproduced as pytest.mark.parametrize cases.
criteria_verification.notes: Extended tests/test_tools_general.py with 14 new TestScenario* classes mapping 1:1 to every general-tool Gherkin scenario in features/feat-jarvis-002-core-tools-and-dispatch.feature: Group A (read_file/search_web/calculate/get_calendar_events happy paths — 4 scenarios), Group B (read_file 1MiB outline 4 examples + search_web max_results outline 5 examples + calculate division-by-zero + calculate overflow), Group C (read_file path_traversal/not_found/not_a_file/encoding + search_web missing-key/empty-query + get_calendar_events invalid_window + calculate unsafe-tokens outline 3 examples), Group D (the 'every tool converts errors into structured strings' outline asserted for all 4 general tools), Group E (read_file null-byte + symlink + .. traversal + search_web DEGRADED + hostile-snippet passthrough). Outline tables are reproduced as pytest.mark.parametrize cases.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `read_file`: happy path + 1MB-boundary table + traversal + null-byte + symlink + not-found + not-a-file + too-large + encoding (9 scenarios).
criteria_verification.evidence: Four new scenario classes plus the original AC-anchored TestAC003-AC008 cover the 9 read_file scenarios: TestScenarioReadFileGroupAUtf8WorkspaceFile (happy path), TestScenarioReadFileGroupB1MibBoundary (4-row Examples table including exactly-1MiB, under-1MiB, over-1MiB, 10MiB), TestScenarioReadFileGroupCNegatives (path_traversal, not_found, not_a_file, encoding — 4 scenarios), TestScenarioReadFileGroupEEvadeWorkspaceGuard (null-byte, symlink-escape, ..-traversal — 3 examples).
criteria_verification.notes: Four new scenario classes plus the original AC-anchored TestAC003-AC008 cover the 9 read_file scenarios: TestScenarioReadFileGroupAUtf8WorkspaceFile (happy path), TestScenarioReadFileGroupB1MibBoundary (4-row Examples table including exactly-1MiB, under-1MiB, over-1MiB, 10MiB), TestScenarioReadFileGroupCNegatives (path_traversal, not_found, not_a_file, encoding — 4 scenarios), TestScenarioReadFileGroupEEvadeWorkspaceGuard (null-byte, symlink-escape, ..-traversal — 3 examples).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `search_web`: happy path + max_results table + missing key + empty query + DEGRADED + hostile-snippet-passthrough (6 scenarios).
criteria_verification.evidence: Four new scenario classes cover the 6 search_web scenarios: TestScenarioSearchWebGroupAConfiguredProvider (happy path returns WebResult JSON array), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupBMaxResultsRange (5-row Examples table for max_results 1/5/10 accepted, 0/11 rejected), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupCNegatives (config_missing + invalid_query empty/whitespace), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupEDegradedAndHostileSnippet (DEGRADED for provider unavailability + hostile snippet preserved verbatim with no side-effecting tool call).
criteria_verification.notes: Four new scenario classes cover the 6 search_web scenarios: TestScenarioSearchWebGroupAConfiguredProvider (happy path returns WebResult JSON array), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupBMaxResultsRange (5-row Examples table for max_results 1/5/10 accepted, 0/11 rejected), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupCNegatives (config_missing + invalid_query empty/whitespace), TestScenarioSearchWebGroupEDegradedAndHostileSnippet (DEGRADED for provider unavailability + hostile snippet preserved verbatim with no side-effecting tool call).

criteria_verification.evidence: Two new scenario classes cover both get_calendar_events scenarios: TestScenarioGetCalendarEventsGroupAEmptyList (asserts '[]' is returned for today/tomorrow/this_week including the implicit default-window call expected by the morning-briefing skill shape), TestScenarioGetCalendarEventsGroupCInvalidWindow (asserts the structured 'ERROR: invalid_window — must be one of today/tomorrow/this_week, got <value>' string and that each allowed window is enumerated for model recoverability).
criteria_verification.notes: Two new scenario classes cover both get_calendar_events scenarios: TestScenarioGetCalendarEventsGroupAEmptyList (asserts '[]' is returned for today/tomorrow/this_week including the implicit default-window call expected by the morning-briefing skill shape), TestScenarioGetCalendarEventsGroupCInvalidWindow (asserts the structured 'ERROR: invalid_window — must be one of today/tomorrow/this_week, got <value>' string and that each allowed window is enumerated for model recoverability).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `calculate`: happy path + division_by_zero + overflow + unsafe tokens table (4 scenarios).
criteria_verification.evidence: Three new scenario classes cover all 4 calculate scenarios: TestScenarioCalculateGroupAArithmetic (happy path '15% of 847' returns the computed numeric string), TestScenarioCalculateGroupBDivisionAndOverflow (division_by_zero parametrized over 4 zero-shapes, overflow over 2 shapes), TestScenarioCalculateGroupCUnsafeTokens (3-row Examples table from .feature line 274 — __import__, open, lambda — assert each is rejected with the structured 'ERROR: unsafe_expression — disallowed token: <token>' string).
criteria_verification.notes: Three new scenario classes cover all 4 calculate scenarios: TestScenarioCalculateGroupAArithmetic (happy path '15% of 847' returns the computed numeric string), TestScenarioCalculateGroupBDivisionAndOverflow (division_by_zero parametrized over 4 zero-shapes, overflow over 2 shapes), TestScenarioCalculateGroupCUnsafeTokens (3-row Examples table from .feature line 274 — __import__, open, lambda — assert each is rejected with the structured 'ERROR: unsafe_expression — disallowed token: <token>' string).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Uses `fake_tavily_response` fixture (monkeypatched Tavily client). No real network.
criteria_verification.evidence: Added the fake_tavily_response fixture to tests/test_tools_general.py at module scope. It monkeypatches general._provider_factory with a _FakeProvider whose search() method records (query, max_results) calls under the '_calls' key and returns a canned dict — identical contract to the fixture in tests/test_search_web.py. All search_web scenario tests consume this fixture (or a tighter monkeypatched stub for DEGRADED / hostile / construction-failure shapes); no test imports langchain_tavily or makes a network call. The configured_jarvis fixture wires a SecretStr API key without touching real env, and cleared_config flushes module-level state between tests.
criteria_verification.notes: Added the fake_tavily_response fixture to tests/test_tools_general.py at module scope. It monkeypatches general._provider_factory with a _FakeProvider whose search() method records (query, max_results) calls under the '_calls' key and returns a canned dict — identical contract to the fixture in tests/test_search_web.py. All search_web scenario tests consume this fixture (or a tighter monkeypatched stub for DEGRADED / hostile / construction-failure shapes); no test imports langchain_tavily or makes a network call. The configured_jarvis fixture wires a SecretStr API key without touching real env, and cleared_config flushes module-level state between tests.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Each @tool's `Every tool converts internal errors into structured strings rather than raising` coverage row is asserted.
criteria_verification.evidence: TestScenarioGroupDStructuredErrorPassthroughGeneralTools exercises the .feature outline at lines 374-388 against all four general tools: read_file (force _resolve_workspace_root to raise RuntimeError, assert no exception propagates and result starts with ERROR/TIMEOUT/DEGRADED), search_web (provider __init__ raises during construction, assert DEGRADED prefix), get_calendar_events (None passed to underlying func, assert ERROR: invalid_window), calculate (parametrized over empty/whitespace/div-by-zero/overflow/lambda/gibberish — all return structured strings without raising). Each test wraps the invocation in try/except + pytest.fail to assert the never-raises invariant explicitly.
criteria_verification.notes: TestScenarioGroupDStructuredErrorPassthroughGeneralTools exercises the .feature outline at lines 374-388 against all four general tools: read_file (force _resolve_workspace_root to raise RuntimeError, assert no exception propagates and result starts with ERROR/TIMEOUT/DEGRADED), search_web (provider __init__ raises during construction, assert DEGRADED prefix), get_calendar_events (None passed to underlying func, assert ERROR: invalid_window), calculate (parametrized over empty/whitespace/div-by-zero/overflow/lambda/gibberish — all return structured strings without raising). Each test wraps the invocation in try/except + pytest.fail to assert the never-raises invariant explicitly.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)

rationale: All quality gates passed. Tests not required for this task type. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 277 chars provided.
